meta.title: mybetrecord — I-Tracker yokubheja kwezemidlalo, i-ROI kunye ne-Kelly Stake Ledger
meta.description: Landela lonke ubhejo kwileja enye eqeqeshekileyo. I-ROI, isivuno, i-Kelly stakes, i-CLV, i-equity curves, kunye nokuthunyelwa ngaphandle - eyakhelwe abantu ababhejela inani.
meta.pricingDescription: Ileja yokubheja yezemidlalo yasimahla eneempawu ezipheleleyo, okanye iPro yokugawulwa kwemithi yonke imihla ngokungenamda malunga ne-5 USD ngenyanga ngemali yakho yasekhaya.

home.heroTitle: Umkhondo wokubheja kwezemidlalo kubantu ababhejela inani
home.heroLead: Yeka ukujija ispreadsheets. Ngena kuyo yonke ibheji, ulandelele i-ROI kunye nesivuno, ubungakanani bemilinganiselo kunye noKelly, kwaye ubone ukuba isiphelo sakho sihlala phi.
home.section1Title: Ukusuka kwisiphithiphithi sespredishithi ukuya kwileja eqeqeshekileyo
home.section1Sub: Uninzi lwababheji lukhupha amanqaku eapps kunye neethebhu zeExcel. mybetrecord ikunika indawo enye yokurekhoda ukubheja, ukulungisa iziphumo, kwaye ufunde amanani okusebenza ngokunyanisekileyo.
home.featureOddsDesc: Iifomathi zedesimali, zaseMelika, eziqhekekileyo, kunye nezaseAsia - ziqheleke ngokuzenzekelayo ukuze iingxelo zihlale zingatshintshi.
home.featureKellyDesc: Seta bankroll kunye namagalelo edge; Fumana ubungakanani besiteyiki esicetyiswayo ngokusekwe kwikhrayitheriya kaKelly.
home.featureRoiDesc: Izinga logwayimbo, imbuyekezo, inzuzo ngenyanga, kunye negophe eliqokelelweyo leequity kubhejo olulungisiweyo.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: Yenza isiqwenga ngomdlalo, uhlobo lokubheja, itipster, okanye umenzi-ncwadi ukuze ufumane apho uphumelele khona kwaye uvuze.
home.featureClvDesc: Rekhoda amathuba okuvala kunye nokulinganisa i-CLV - isignali ebukhali kuneziphumo zexesha elifutshane kuphela.
home.featureExportDesc: Khuphela i-CSV, Excel, okanye i-JSON. Yenza izitshixo ze-API zemibhalo kunye ne-automation.
home.pricingSub: Yonke into engezantsi ibandakanyiwe kuzo zombini izicwangciso. I-Pro isusa i-cap yemihla ngemihla yokuloga - malunga ne-$ 5 USD ngenyanga ngemali yakho yasekhaya.
home.pricingFreeLimit: Ukuya kuthi ga kwi-5 yokubheja kunye ne-5 multis ngosuku
home.pricingProLimit: Ukubheja okungenamkhawulo kunye nee-multis yonke imihla
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Ileja yokubheja epheleleyo — imisitho, ukhetho, iziteki, iziphumo & P/L
home.pricingFeatureOdds: Zonke iifomathi zemiqobo - idesimali, iMelika, iqhezu kunye neAsia
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Lonke uhlobo lokubheja — ukuphumelela, indlela nganye, ngaphezulu-ngaphantsi, ezininzi kunye nokukhubazeka
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Ukulinganisa isitake sikaKelly kwi-bankroll yakho kunye nomda ochaziweyo
home.pricingFeatureReports: I-ROI, isivuno, izinga logwayimbo kunye nejiko lolingano elongezelekayo
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Ukwahlulwa kwezemidlalo, uhlobo lokubheja, itipster & nombhuki
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Imodeli kunye nee-odd zobuqu ezichaziweyo kunye nomphetho weyunithi nganye
home.pricingFeatureSettlement: Iimali ezikhutshwayo kunye nokutsalwa kokuwina kwabaphumeleleyo
home.pricingFeatureLocale: Ujongano lweelwimi ezininzi kunye nenkxaso yendawo yexesha
home.pricingNote: Ipro malunga ne-$5 USD ngenyanga, iboniswe ngemali yakho yasekhaya. Rhoxisa nanini na kwiiSetingi.
home.section2Sub: Funda izibalo emva kweemetrics - emva koko uzilandele kwileja yakho.
home.blogRoiDesc: Amanani amabini entloko, ahlala ebhidekile. Yazi ukuba ngowuphi ophendula umbuzo.
home.blogKellyDesc: Indlela esebenza ngayo imilinganiselo yesibonda-kwaye kutheni uninzi lwababheji basebenzisa iqhezu leKelly epheleleyo.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: Xa i-Excel yanele - kwaye xa i-ledger ezinikeleyo igcina iiyure kunye neempazamo.
home.faqTrackerA: I-ledger ehleliweyo kuyo yonke ibheji - iziteki, izinto ezingathandekiyo, iziphumo, kunye nenzuzo - ene-ROI ezenzekelayo, isivuno, kunye nokwahlulahlula endaweni yeefomyula zespredishithi.
home.faqOddsA: Idesimali, iMelika, iqhezu, iHong Kong, isiMalaysian, nesiIndonesian. Lonke ubhejo lugcinwe nge-canonical decimal odds ukuze kunikwe ingxelo.
home.faqKellyA: Ngenisa izinto ezingeyomfuneko kubhejo. Nge-bankroll kunye ne-Kelly multiplier esetwe kuseto, i-app icebisa isibonda ngokusekwe kumda wakho ochaziweyo.
home.faqExportQ: Ngaba ndingathumela ngaphandle okanye ndisebenzise i-API?
home.faqExportA: Ewe - i-CSV, i-Excel, kunye ne-JSON ithumela ngaphandle kunye nezitshixo ze-API zokufikelela kwenkqubo kwirekhodi yakho.
home.faqTipsterA: Hayi mybetrecord igcina irekhodi kunye nohlalutyo kuphela. Asithengisi iipeki okanye sithembisa ingeniso.
home.rg: Ukungcakaza okunoxanduva. Ukubheja kufuneka kube kukuzonwabisa, kungekhona umvuzo. Ungaze ubeke esichengeni ngaphezu kokuba unako ukuhlawulela ukulahlekelwa. Ukuba ukungcakaza kuchaphazela ubomi bakho, funa uncedo kwimibutho efana BeGambleAware okanye Unyango lokungcakaza. I-mybetrecord ayiququzeleli ukubheja - ikunceda ukuba uqonde imbali yakho.
home.ctaLead: Yenza i-akhawunti yasimahla kwaye ufake ukubheja kwakho kokuqala phantsi komzuzu.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Uhlalutyo kunye nokugcina irekhodi - hayi iingcebiso zongcakazo.

blog.indexSub: Funda izibalo emva kweemetrics - emva koko uzilandele kwileja yakho.
blog.ctaLead: Ukubheja kwelogi, bona i-ROI kunye nesivuno, kunye nemilinganiselo yobungakanani kunye noKelly - iakhawunti yasimahla.
blog.rg: Ukungcakaza okunoxanduva. Umxholo wemfundo kuphela — hayi iingcebiso zokubheja. Ungaze ubeke esichengeni ngaphezu kokuba unako ukuhlawulela ukulahlekelwa.

spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.title: I-Spreadsheet vs i-Tracker yokubheja eZinikezeleyo
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.description: Xa i-Excel yanele kwirekhodi yakho yokubheja - kwaye xa umkhondo ozinikeleyo egcina ixesha, iimpazamo, kunye neendawo ezingaboniyo.
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.body:
Ispreadsheets sisiqalo sokubheja jikelele. Bakhululekile, babhetyebhetye, kwaye baqhelekile. Abaninzi ababhejayo abaze babashiye. Abanye babethe udonga — ngokuqhelekileyo xa ukuntsokotha kungaphezu kweeseli kunye neefomula.

Xa i-spreadsheets zisebenza

  • Ngaphantsi kwe ~50 yokubheja ngenyanga
  • Umdlalo omnye, imali enye, idecimal odds kuphela
  • Iziphumo ezilula zokuphumelela / ezilahlekileyo, akukho ndlela nganye okanye ikhomishini yokutshintshiselana
  • Uyonwabela ukugcina iifomula

Apho i-spreadsheets zaphuka khona

Ingxaki Intlungu yespreadsheet Inzuzo yomkhondo Iifomati zeOdds Iikholam zokuguqula ngezandla Uhlengahlengiso oluzenzekelayo Indlela nganye / EW Iimpazamo-eqhelekile kwiifomula zokwahlula Indawo yokuhlala eyakhelwe-ngaphakathi Kelly sizing Yakha kwakhona xa ibhanki itshintsha Ingcebiso ephilayo ngokubheja CLV Iikholamu ezongezelelweyo, kulula ukuyitsiba Ibala kulo lonke ubhejo Ukwaphuka Ukugcinwa kwetafile yePivot Cofa-kanye ngomdlalo/umcebisi API / automation Izikripthi ezibuthathaka Izitshixo ze-API zodidi lokuqala Ungeniso lweselula Clunky Usetyenziso lwewebhu oluphendulayo

Ixabiso elifihliweyo: ixesha

Imizuzu elishumi ngeveki ukulungisa iifomula kunye neempazamo zekopi-uncamathisele zigqithise iindleko zesixhobo esizinikele kuye nabani na obheja ngokuzimisela. Iindleko ezinkulu izigqibo ezimbi ezivela kwidatha embi- i-void efakwe njengelahleko, ikhomishini ekhohliweyo.

Indlela yokufuduka

  1. Thumela ngaphandle nantoni na onayo (i-CSV ilungile)
  2. Ngenisa ngaphandle okanye uphinde utshixe ukubheja kwesizini yakutshanje
  3. Baleka ngokunxuseneyo iiveki ezimbini — iitotali kufuneka zihambelane
  4. Yeka umhlala phantsi kwi-spreadsheet xa iingxelo zivuma

    5. Yintoni engafanele yenziwe ngumlandeli

    Akufunekanga ithengise iipeki, ithembise i-ROI, okanye ithathe indawo yoqeqesho lwebhanki. i-mybetrecord luhlalutyo kunye nokugcina irekhodi — ispredishithi ongenakusophula ngempazamo.

    Zama zombini ngokunyanisekileyo

    Gcina iphepha lakho inyanga enye kodwa faka ubhejo olutsha kwi-mybetrecord. Thelekisa inzuzo yokuphela kwenyanga kunye nesivuno. Ukuba ziyahambelana kwaye i-tracker igcinwe ixesha, tshintsha.

    Qala mahala: Yenza i-akhawunti — akukho khadi elifunekayo ukuqalisa ukuloga.

betting-equity-curve.title: Ukufunda iCurve yakho yokuBetha ngokuLingana
betting-equity-curve.description: Igophe lokulingana liceba inzuzo eyongezelekayo ngokuhamba kwexesha. Funda ukuba zithetha ntoni iimilo, kutheni ukubheja okulindileyo kungabandakanywa, kunye nendlela yokubona ukukhukuliseka.
betting-equity-curve.body:
I-igophe lokulingana yitshathi yomgca yenzuzo eyongezelekayo (okanye i-bankroll) emva kokubheja ngakunye, ngokulandelelana kweziganeko. Ijika itheyibhile yeziphumo ibe libali onokulifunda ngokukrwada.

Ibukeka njani igophe elisempilweni

I-Positive edge ene-sensible staking ivelisa ukukhukuliseka okuya phezulu kunye nokutsalwa - hayi umgca othe ngqo. Amaxesha amafutshane eflethi okanye asezantsi ayinto eqhelekileyo; Ukukhukuliseka okuzinzileyo ngokuchasene nawe kungabonakalisa ukubola kwemodeli okanye ukutyibilika kokuziphatha.

Iimilo zegophe eziqhelekileyo

Ukugaya okuzinzile - imida emincinci, ukuhluka kwemidlalo ephantsi (ezinye iimarike zokutshintshiselana). Ithambeka elingenzulwanga, imizobo emincinci.

I-Volatile spikes - iipotfoliyo ezinde-ezinzima. Iiswidi ezinkulu; I-ROI iyodwa ilahlekisa ngaphandle komxholo westake.

I-Cliff drop — amaxesha amaninzi iziteki ziye zanda emva kwe-hot streak (non-Kelly behaviour) okanye iqhinga lokutshintsha phakathi kwesampulu.

Ukubheja okulindileyo

Ukubheja okungazinzanga akufuneki kuvele kwi-equity curve — abakayiqondi i-P/L okwangoku. Ukuqukwa kwazo kunyusa okanye kwehlisa umgca ngenkohliso.

I-Bankroll vs ijika lenzuzo

Ezinye iitshathi iyelenqeukuqala bankroll + inzuzo eyongezelekayo; abanye baceba inzuzo kuphela. Lungelelanisa itshathi kunye nendlela olawula ngayo imali ngengqondo. Igophe lokulingana kwe-mybetrecord isebenzisa inzuzo ehleliweyo ekuhambeni kwexesha; bankroll kwi ticker iquka bankroll yakho eqwalaselweyo emiselweyo plus waqaphela P/L.

Ukusebenzisa igophe ngokuxilonga

  1. Utshintsho lweqhinga lokumakisha kumgca wexesha (imidlalo entsha, i-tipster entsha)
  2. Thelekisa ukuthambeka kwegophe phambi/emva kotshintsho
  3. I-avareji ye-avareji yesibonda - ngaba iyantlukwano iqhutywa okanye iqhutywa?

    4. Dibanisa nezinye iimetrics

    Iequity curves zilala ngokushiyiwa ukuba awuyihoyi i-CLV, isivuno, kunye nobungakanani besampulu. Sebenzisa igophe kwi-intuition; sebenzisa iitafile ukwenza izigqibo.

    Jonga ijiko lobulungisa kwiingxelo ze-mybetrecord emva kokuloga kubhejo olubekiweyo.

each-way-bet-settlement.title: Indlela nganye yokuBheja icacisiwe
each-way-bet-settlement.description: Indlela nganye yokubheja ihlawula ngokuphumelela kunye nokubeka iinxalenye. Imizekelo esetyenziwe ngamaqhezu eendawo kunye nemithetho yobushushu bokufa.
each-way-bet-settlement.body:
I-indlela nganyeukubheja kukubheja ezimbini kwenye: isiqingatha sesigxina ekukhethweni ukuphumelela, isiqingatha kuyo ukubeka (ukugqiba kwiindawo ngokwemiqathango yencwadi). Ulungiso lwezibalo lukhwelisa i-spreadsheets ezininzi.

Ulwakhiwo

Itotali yesibonda S esahlulahlulwe:

  • Inxalenye yokuphumelela: S/2 kwi-win odds
  • Beka indawo: S/2 kwindawo engathandekiyo

Indawo engathandekiyo = 1 + (win odds − 1) × iqhezu lendawo

Iqhezu lendawo eqhelekileyo: 1/4 okanye 1/5 ye-win odds.

Umzekelo — ophumeleleyo

I-£20 indlela nganye (i-£10 iphumelele + i-£10 indawo) kwi-10.00 i-odds yokuphumelela, imimiselo yendawo ye-1/4.

  • Win part ihlawula: 10 × £10 = £100 return (£90 profit)
  • Amathuba eendawo: 1 + (10 − 1) × 0.25 = 3.25 → 3.25 × £10 = £32.50 imbuyekezo (£22.50 inzuzo)
  • Inzuzo epheleleyo = £ 90 + £22.50 = £112.50

Umzekelo — ibekwe kuphela

Ukubheja okufanayo, ihashe ligqiba isibini (indawo zihlawulwe, aliphumelelanga):

  • Inxalenye yokuphumelela ilahlekelwe: −£10
  • Indawo indawo okuphumelela: £22.50 inzuzo njengoko ngasentla
  • Inzuzo egcweleyo = £ 12.50

Umzekelo — ayibekwanga

Omabini amalungu alahlekile: −£20 (isibonda esipheleleyo).

Utshintshiselwano kunye neemeko ezizodwa

Utshintshiselwano luhlala lwahlula ukuphumelela kunye nentengiso yendawo — hayi itikiti elinye lokuya ngakunye. Ubushushu obufileyo bunciphisa ukubuyiswa kwendawo. Umthetho we-4 otsalwayo uyasebenza kugqatso lwamaqela okuphumelela.

Soloko urekhoda each_way=true kunye nendawo_fraction kwileja yakho ukuze isoftwe isebenzise ifomula efanayo ngalo lonke ixesha.

Landela indlela nganye kwi-mybetrecord

Guqula indlela nganye ekungeneni kokubheja, seta iqhezu lendawo, kwaye uvumele ulungiso lubuyise inzuzo xa uphawula impumelelo/ilahleko/ebekwe iziphumo.

odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.title: Iifomathi ze-Odds-idesimali, i-American, kunye ne-Fractional
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.description: Guqula phakathi kwedesimali, iMelika, kunye ne-fractional odds. Itheyibhile yoReferensi kunye neefomula zeHong Kong, isiMalaysia, kunye neefomathi zaseIndonesia.
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.body:
Ababhuki kwihlabathi jikelele babonisa amaxabiso ngokwahlukileyo. Ileja eqeqeshekileyo igcina enye idesimali yecanonical ngaphakathi ngelixa ikuvumela ukuba ubheje ngayo nayiphi na ifomathi oyibonayo kwiscreen.

Idesimali (yaseYurophu)

Imbuyekezo iyonke ngokweyunithi yestake ukuquka isibonda. Idesimali 2.50 → win £1.50 profit on £1 staked.

Inzuzo = isibonda × (idesimali − 1)

yaseMelika (i-moneyline)

Okuhle (+150): inzuzo kwi-£100 yesiteki. +150 → isishumi 2.50.

Negative (−200): isiteki siyafuneka ukuze uphumelele i-£100. −200 → isishumi 1.50.

Uguqulo:

  • Ukuba American > 0: idesimali = 1 + American/100
  • Ukuba American < 0: idesimali = 1 + 100/|American|

I-fractional (UK)

6/4 kuthetha ukuphumelela i-£6 nge-£4 nganye ebekiweyo. Idesimali = 1 + inani/idinomineyitha = 2.50.

Ezinye iisayithi zibonisa “6/4” njengeqhezu lokuwina kuphela; soloko uqinisekisa ukuba i-stake ibandakanyiwe kumboniso.

iifomathi zaseAsia

Uhlobo Umzekelo idesimali Hong Kong 0.85 1.85 Malaysian + 0.85 1.85 Malaysian − −0.85 1 + 1/0.85 ≈ 2.176 Isi-Indonesian + 1.50 2.50 Isi-Indonesian − −1.50 1 + 1/1.50 ≈ 1.667

Kutheni ukwenziwa kwesiqhelo kubalulekile

Ukuxuba iifomati kwispreadsheet esinye kubangela iimpazamo ezithe cwaka - i-American minus signs, fractional denominators, okanye ukuphatha i-HK njengedesimali. Isoftware kufuneka iguqulelwe kwigalelo kwaye ingaze ilahleke ngokuchaneka.

Ingcebiso esebenzayo

Seta ifomati yongeno emiselweyo kwi-tracker yakho ehambelana nombhuki oyintloko wakho, kodwa qinisekisa idesimali elinganayo kugcino de umkhwa ubambelele.

i-mybetrecord yamkela zonke iifomati ezidwelisiweyo kwaye igcina idecimal odd kuyo yonke ingxelo kunye nokubalwa kukaKelly.

closing-line-value-clv.title: Ixabiso lomgca wokuvala (i-CLV) — Kutheni i-Sharp Bettors iyilandelela
closing-line-value-clv.description: Ukulinganisa ixabiso lomgca wokuvala nokuba ulibethe ixabiso lokugqibela lemarike. Funda ukubala i-CLV kwaye kutheni iqikelela isakhono sexesha elide.
closing-line-value-clv.body:
Ixabiso lomgca wokuvala (i-CLV) lithelekisa ii-odds ozithathileyo xa imarike ivaliwe (idla ngokukhaba okanye ukubaleka). Ukubetha into esondeleyo ngokuqhubekayo sesinye seziqikelelo ezinamandla zengeniso yexesha elide - yomelele kuneP/L yenyanga enethamsanqa.

Kutheni umgca wokuvala ubalulekile

Iimarike zidibanisa ulwazi. Ixabiso lokuvala libonisa uqikelelo olubukhali olukhoyo ngaphambi komcimbi. Ukuba ufumana rhoqo i-2.10 xa ukuvala kuyi-2.00, ufumana ixabiso phambi kokuba imarike ilungise.

Ukubala i-CLV

Inkcazelo eqhelekileyo:

CLV % = (amathuba akho edesimali ÷ ukuvala amathuba edesimali − 1) × 100%

Umzekelo: ubheje ngo 2.20, kuvalwe ngu 2.00.

CLV = (2.20 ÷ 2.00 − 1) × 100 = +10%

I-CLV engalunganga ithetha ukuba uthathe kakubi kakhulu kunokuvalwa — nokuba ubhejo oluphumeleleyo lunokuba yinkqubo embi yokubheja.

CLV vs iziphumo

Ukwahluka kufihla isakhono kwiisampuli ezincinci. Ungalahlekelwa yimali nge-CLV enepositive iiveki, okanye uphumelele nge-CLV e-negative kwi-heater. Track CLV phezu amakhulu yokubheja inkqubo jaji.

Yintoni onokuyibhala

Kubhejo ngalunye, gcina:

  • Odds ozithathileyo (nayiphi na indlela)
  • Ukuvala amathuba (imarike efanayo, ukhetho olufanayo)
  • Isitampu sexesha ukuba umgca uhamba phakathi kosuku

Utshintshiselwano luyavalwa luyavalwa kwiincwadi ezithambileyo — hlala ungaguquguquki kwidatha yakho.

Unyino

  • Umgca wokuvala awuyonyaniso esisiseko — iintshukumo zomphunga nazo zinokungalunganga
  • Amathuba okuthengisa kunye nokwandisa uthelekiso olugqwethekileyo
  • Iimarike ezincinci zinengxolo ezivalwayo

Sebenzisa i-CLV kwi-mybetrecord

Yongeza amathuba okuvala ubhejo okanye uhlele. Iingxelo zinokuvela kumndilili we-CLV ecaleni kwe-ROI ukuze wahlule ithamsanqa kumda.

kelly-criterion-explained.title: Kelly Criterion Icaciswe kubabheji
kelly-criterion-explained.description: Ubungakanani bekhrayitheriya ye-Kelly buxhomekeke kumda kunye nobunzima. Funda ifomyula, iKelly eqhekekileyo, kunye nomzekelo wamanani onokuwuqinisekisa.
kelly-criterion-explained.body:
I ikhrayitheriya kaKelly iphendula umbuzo omnye: xa ujonga umphetho wakho oqikelelweyo, leliphi iqhezu le-bankroll omele ulibambe ukuze ukwandise ukukhula kwexesha elide - ngaphandle kokubeka emngciphekweni umonakalo owenziwe kakubi?

Ifomula (idecimal odds)

Ukufumana amathuba edesimali O kwaye uphumelele amathuba p:

Iqhezu likaKelly = (O × p − 1) / (O − 1)

Isibonda = iqhezu le-Kelly × i-bankroll (ihlala iphindaphindwa yinto yokhuseleko).

Umzekelo wamanani

Ukholelwa ukuba iqela linamathuba angama-55% okuphumelela kwidecimal odds 2.00 (kwanemali).

  • p = 0.55, O = 2.0
  • Kelly = (2.0 × 0.55 − 1) / (2.0 − 1) = 0.10 / 1.0 = 10% yebhanki

Kwi-£1,000 yebhanki, uKelly ogcweleyo ucebisa i-£100. Uninzi lwababheki basebenzisa isiqingatha uKelly (5%, £ 50) okanye ikota uKelly ukunciphisa ukuhluka.

Umda ovela kwimiqobo echaziweyo

Ukuba “ilungile” ixabiso yi-decimal 1.91 (echaza i-52.4%) kwaye ufumana i-2.00 (echazwe 50%), unomphetho olungileyo. U-Kelly uguqula loo ngqameko idityaniswe ne-odds enikelweyo ibe yisayizi yestake.

Kutheni engasoloko egcwele uKelly?

I-Kelly egcweleyo ikhulisa ukukhula kwejometri kwithiyori. Isebenza:

  • Uqikelelo lwakho lwep alulunganga rhoqo kunokuba ucinga
  • Ukubheja kwangaxeshanye (iligi efanayo, usuku olunye)
  • Ukutsalwa kwengqondo kubangela ukulahla inkqubo

I-Fractional Kelly (0.25–0.5×) isemgangathweni phakathi kwababheji abaqeqeshiweyo.

Iimpazamo eziqhelekileyo

  • Usebenzisa uKelly xa ungenamphetho woqikelelo lokwenyani
  • Ukusebenzisa uKelly kwiipalayi ezihambelanayo njengemisitho ezimeleyo
  • Ukungahoyi i-bankroll engeyiyo ngokwenene “inkunzi yomngcipheko”

Landela uKelly kwi-mybetrecord

Seta i-bankroll kunye no-Kelly umphindaphindi kwiisetingi. Faka izinto ezingathi zingangeniswa kubhejo ngalunye ukuze ubone isiteki esicetyiswayo ecaleni kwesibonda sakho sokwenyani - ukujonga impilo, hayi umyalelo.

roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.title: I-ROI vs Yield kuBheja kwezeMidlalo
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.description: I-ROI kunye nemveliso yokulinganisa ukubheja ngokungafaniyo. Funda iifomula, imizekelo esetyenziweyo, kunye nexesha lokusebenzisa imetriki nganye.
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.body:
ROI (ukubuyisela kwi-investment) kunye isivuno zimbini iinombolo eziphambili ze-bettors quote. Ziyazalana kodwa azitshintsheki — ukusebenzisa engalunganga kunokwenza ikhefu-inyanga ibonakale njengentlekele, okanye ngokuphambeneyo.

Iingcaciso

ROI = inzuzo iyonke ÷ iziteki zizonke × 100%

Isivuno = inzuzo iyonke ÷ imbuyekezo iyonke × 100%

Kumbheja osicaba ongaze andise ubungakanani, iturnover ilingana neziteki kwaye amanani ayahambelana. Xa izithinteli zinokwahluka - ukulinganisa kukaKelly, ukudityaniswa, okanye ukuxutywa kweeyunithi - ziyahlukana.

Umzekelo osebenzayo

Masithi ngaphezu kwe-10 yokubheja uhlawule i-£100 ngexesha ngalinye (i-£1,000 ye-stakes iyonke) kwaye wenze i-£50 yenzuzo.

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%
  • Isivuno = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%

Ngoku cinga ukuba enye yokubheja yayiyi-£500 kwaye enye i-£50 (i-£950 yesiteki iyonke), inzuzo efanayo eyi-£50:

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 950 × 100 ≈ 5.3%
  • Imveliso isalatha ireferensi ngendlela efanayo ukuba i-turnover = stakes

Ukudideka kudla ngokuvela xa abantu bexubai-bankroll ROI (inzuzo ÷ ukuqala i-bankroll) kunye i-ROI ye-stake. Hlala uleyibhile ukuba yeyiphi idinomineyitha oyithethayo.

Usebenzisa nini i-ROI

I-ROI kwiziteki iyaphendula: “Kuyo yonke iponti endiyibeke emngciphekweni, yimalini ebuyisiweyo?” Ilungele ukuthelekisa amaqhinga aneepateni ezifanayo zesiteyiki.

Kusetyenziswa nini isivuno

Isivuno kwi-turnover ixhaphakile kwingxelo yoshishino kunye nophicotho lwetipster. Igxininisa ukusebenza kakuhle ngeyunithi ebhejwayo nokuba ingakanani na ibhanki.

Izinga loqhankqalazo alanelanga

I-60% yoqhankqalazo kwi-avareji ye-odds 1.50 ilahlekelwa yimali. Ngamabini i-ROI/isivuno kunye ne-avareji ye-odds kunye ne-CLV ukubona ukuba i-edge yinyani okanye iyahluka.

Ukuthathwa okusebenzayo

Khetha i-metric yokuqala kwaye unamathele kuyo unyaka nonyaka. I-mybetrecord inika ingxelo ngenzuzo kunye nesivuno kubhejo olulungisiweyo ukuze ulungelelanise nokuba ngowuphi umgangatho owusebenzisayo isicwangciso sakho sestaking.

what-is-a-betting-ledger.title: Yintoni iLedger yokuBheja?
what-is-a-betting-ledger.description: Ileja yokubheja yirekhodi ecwangcisiweyo yayo yonke ibheji oyibekayo. Funda ukuba kutheni ababheji abaqeqeshekileyo begcina enye kunye nento ekufuneka uyilandele.
what-is-a-betting-ledger.body:
I-ledger yokubheja yingxelo epheleleyo, elandelelanayo yeebheji zakho: uxhase ntoni, ngawaphi amathuba, kangakanani, kwaye ihlaliswe njani. Yicinge njengomahluko phakathi kokuthelekelela ukuba ulungele isizini kunye noukwazi.

Kutheni i-spreadsheets zisilela

Ababheji abaninzi baqala kwi-Excel okanye kwi-Google Sheets. Oko kusebenza kude kube:

  • Iifomyula ziqhawula xa usongeza indlela nganye okanye utshintshiselwano lwekhomishini ikholam
  • Uyalibala ukuloga indawo engenanto okanye ukhuphe imali
  • Awukwazi ukusika ngetipster okanye ezemidlalo ngaphandle kokwakha kwakhona iitafile zepivot

Ileja ezinikeleyo iyenza iqheleke amathuba, ibuyise inzuzo kuhlelo ngalunye, kwaye igcina iingxelo zingatshintshi.

Yintoni onokuyibhala

Ubuncinane, log:

  1. Isiganeko kunye nokukhethwa - iinkcukacha ezaneleyo zokuqaphela iinyanga zokubheja kamva
  2. I-Stake kunye nemali
  3. Odds (kuyo nayiphi na ifomathi eboniswa yincwadi)
  4. Isiphumo — ilindile, iphumelele, ilahleko, ingabikho
  5. Inzuzo ehleliweyo - okanye vumela isofthiwe ukuba ifumane kwimigaqo yesiphumo

    6. Imimandla ekwinqanaba eliphambili elahlula iitraki ezibukhali kubantu abaqhelekileyo:

    • Amathuba obuqu achaziweyo (ixabiso lakho elifanelekileyo)
    • Amathuba omgca wokuvala (ye-CLV)
    • Tipster okanye imodeli yomthombo
    • Ubhuki kunye nekhomishini

    Ledger vs ijenali

    Abantu basebenzisa “ijenali yokubheja” kunye “incwadi yokubheja” ngokutshintshisanayo. Ngokungqongqo, ijenali inokubandakanya amanqaku okubalisa (“ivakale ingxamile”, “umgca uhanjisiwe”); Ileja igxininisa amanani. Ezona zixhobo zingcono zidibanisa zombini: idatha ecwangcisiweyo kunye namanqaku abhaliweyo asimahla ngokubheja ngakunye.

    Ngubani ofuna enye?

    Nabani na ophatha ukubheja njengomdlalo wezakhono kunamatikiti elotho:

    • Ababheji abafanisiweyo balandelela abafanelekileyo kunye nokubheja simahla
    • Abarhwebi abatshintshiselanayo abalinganisa isivuno esilungisiweyo sekhomishini
    • Abalandeli bakaTipster baqinisekisa i-ROI epapashiweyo
    • Ababhengezi bolonwabo abafuna ulawulo lwebhanki olunyanisekileyo

    Ukuqalisa

    Chonga uhlobo olunye lwezemidlalo okanye lwemarike kwaye ubhale ukubheja okulandelayo okungama-20 ngaphandle kokutshintsha inkqubo yakho. Phonononga izinga loqhankqalazo, amathuba okuba phakathi, kunye nengeniso ngeveki. Eso siseko sixabiseke ngaphezu kwayo nayiphi na ingcebiso.

    Landela oku kwi-mybetrecord: yenza i-akhawunti yasimahla, seta i-bankroll yakho kunye nefomathi ye-odds engagqibekanga, kwaye ungene kubhejo lwakho lokuqala ngaphantsi komzuzu.
